children.heading: .—Applicability of Certain Administrative Provisions
children.label: a .—Applicability of Certain Administrative Provisions
children.text: Notwithstanding , subchapter II of chapter 5 and chapter 7 of title 5 are applicable in the administration of sections 6501 to 6507 and 6511 of this title.section 553 of title 5

children.heading: .—Judicial Review in General
children.label: b .—Judicial Review in General
children.text: Notwithstanding the inclusion of representations and stipulations in a contract under , an interested person has the right of judicial review of any legal question which might otherwise be raised, including wage determinations and the interpretation of the terms “locality” and “open market”.section 6502 of this title

children.heading: .—Judicial Review of Wage Determinations
children.label: c .—Judicial Review of Wage Determinations
children.text: A person adversely affected or aggrieved by a wage determination under has the right of judicial review of the determination, or of the applicability of the determination, within 90 days after the determination is made, in the manner provided by chapter 7 of title 5. A person adversely affected or aggrieved by a wage determination is deemed to include a person in an industry to which the determination applies that is a supplier of materials, supplies, articles, or equipment that are purchased or intended to be purchased by the Federal Government from any source.section 6502(1) of this title
